description: Dashboard Bale DGOD – Optimized: flat queries, consistent timezone, correct thresholds, trend panels

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('second', th.transaction_date - interval '7 hour') AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "TPS"
FROM raw_bale th
WHERE
  th.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND th.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
  AND th.transaction_state IN ('1', '9', '8')
  AND th.transaction_category IN (
    'ACTIVATE_DORMANT','BILLPAYMENT_BANK_LOAN','BILLPAYMENT_BPJS_KESEHATAN',
    'BILLPAYMENT_BPJS_TENAGA_KERJA','BILLPAYMENT_CREDIT_CARD','BILLPAYMENT_CREDIT_CARD_OTHER',
    'BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_ACT','BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_BAZNAS','BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_DOMPET',
    'BILLPAYMENT_ECOM_BUKALAPAK','BILLPAYMENT_ECOM_TOKOPEDIA','BILLPAYMENT_EDUCATION',
    'BILLPAYMENT_INSURANCE','BILLPAYMENT_INTERNET_TV','BILLPAYMENT_MPN',
    'BILLPAYMENT_MULTIBILLER','BILLPAYMENT_MULTIBILLER_LEGAL','BILLPAYMENT_NON_PBB',
    'BILLPAYMENT_OTHER_LOAN','BILLPAYMENT_PBB','BILLPAYMENT_PDAM',
    'BILLPAYMENT_PEGADAIAN','BILLPAYMENT_PGN','BILLPAYMENT_PHONE',
    'BILLPAYMENT_PLN','BILLPAYMENT_TICKET_TRAIN','BILLPAYMENT_TRANSPORTATION',
    'BILLPAYMENT_VA','BILLPAYMENT_VA_MORTGAGE','BILLPAYMENT_VEHICLE_TAX',
    'BUY_MUTUAL_FUND','BUY_SBN','CARDLESS_DEPOSIT','CARDLESS_WITHDRAWAL',
    'EDEPOSITO_PLACEMENT','FREEZE_PROXY_BIFAST','MONEY_CHANGER',
    'PORTING_PROXY_BIFAST','PURCHASE_EVOUCHER_MTIX','PURCHASE_EVOUCHER_STREAMING',
    'PURCHASE_NFC_EMONEY','PURCHASE_NFC_FLAZZ','PURCHASE_NFC_TAPCASH',
    'PURCHASE_PHONE','PURCHASE_PLN_PREPAID','PURCHASE_TOPUP_DANA',
    'PURCHASE_TOPUP_GOPAY','PURCHASE_TOPUP_ISAKU','PURCHASE_TOPUP_LINKAJA',
    'PURCHASE_TOPUP_OVO','PURCHASE_TOPUP_POSPAY','PURCHASE_TOPUP_SHOPEEPAY',
    'QR_CROSS_BORDER','QR_MPM','REGISTRATION_PROXY_BIFAST','SELL_MUTUAL_FUND',
    'SWITCH_FROM_MUTUAL_FUND','SWITCH_TO_MUTUAL_FUND','TRANSFER_ALL',
    'TRANSFER_BIFAST','TRANSFER_FOREX_OA','TRANSFER_FOREX_ON_US',
    'TRANSFER_OA','TRANSFER_OFF_US','TRANSFER_ON_US','TRANSFER_RTGS',
    'TRANSFER_SKN','TRANSFER_SPLIT_BILL','TRANSFER_SWIFT',
    'UNFREEZE_PROXY_BIFAST','UNREGISTRATION_PROXY_BIFAST','UPDATE_PROXY_BIFAST'
  )
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 DESC;

SELECT date_trunc('second', th.transaction_date  - interval '7 hour') AS time,
  SUM(CASE
    WHEN dc.error_type = 'Sukses' OR th.result_code IS NULL OR th.result_code = ''
    THEN 1 ELSE 0
  END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT th.transaction_id), 0) * 100 AS "Sukses",
  SUM(CASE WHEN dc.error_type = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT th.transaction_id), 0) * 100 AS "Bisnis Error",
  SUM(CASE WHEN dc.error_type = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric

  AND th.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND th.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('second', th.transaction_date  - interval '7 hour') AS time,

  COUNT(DISTINCT th.transaction_id) AS "Sistem Error"

WITH top_errors AS (
  SELECT CONCAT(th.result_code, ' > ', th.transaction_category) AS nama_error,
    th.result_code, th.transaction_category,
    COUNT(th.transaction_id) AS total_count
  FROM raw_bale th
  INNER JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
    ON th.result_code = dc.rc
    AND th.transaction_category = dc.jenis_transaksi
    AND dc.id_app_identifier = 1

FROM raw_bale th
LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
  ON th.result_code = dc.rc AND th.transaction_category = dc.jenis_transaksi AND dc.id_app_identifier = 1
WHERE th.transaction_state IN ('1','9','8')
  AND th.transaction_category = ANY(ARRAY['QR_CPM'])
  AND th.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND th.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

WITH top_errors AS (
  SELECT CONCAT(th.result_code, ' > ', th.transaction_category) AS nama_error,
    th.result_code, th.transaction_category,
    COUNT(th.transaction_id) AS total_count
  FROM raw_bale th
  INNER JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
    ON th.result_code = dc.rc
    AND th.transaction_category = dc.jenis_transaksi
    AND dc.id_app_identifier = 1
  WHERE dc.error_type = 'S'

    AND th.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND th.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
  ORDER BY 4 DESC

),
ranked_data AS (
  SELECT t.nama_error,
    (rb.transaction_date - interval '7 hour')::timestamp(0) AS transaction_date,
    rb.esb_ref_no, t.total_count,
